Fornybar Norge

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/
Avvik: 185 | Bestått: 175
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/99246f47abf44955952f2b1551e54b1b/adobestock_340354044.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/99
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/792065359c9c4b8a87e900ce7a036e3d/img_2957.jpeg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/792065359c9c4b
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/18382.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/18382.jpg?mode=crop&a
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="article-item__heading"> <a href="/nyheter/2026/fornybar-norge-vil-halvere-tiden-det-tar-a-fa-pa-plass-stromnett/">Vil halvere tiden det tar å få på plass strømnett </a> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (5 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/nyheter/2026/fornybar-norge-vil-halvere-tiden-det-tar-a-fa-pa-plass-stromnett/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/99246f47abf44955
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/nyheter/2026/dagfrid-forberg-skal-lede-stab-og-strategi-i-fornybar-norge/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/792065359c9c4b8a87e90
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/nyheter/2026/veileder-for-innenlands-transport-med-helikopter/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2026/2/18382.jpg?mode=cr
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'standardavtaler-og-fakta' appears 2 times

id="standardavtaler-og-fakta"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (171 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=8&content.link=1125&content.category=22,35,1847&content.type.category=&content.tags=
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Innlogging til medlemsportal

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/medlemsportal/
Avvik: 178 | Bestått: 163
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6>Ta kontakt med Medlemssenteret ved problemer</h6>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Ta kontakt med Medlemssenteret.</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://arbinn.nho.no/kontakt-oss/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">chat med Medlemssenteret på hverdager mellom 08.00 - 15.00</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="http://arbinn.nho.no/kontakt-oss/" rel="noopener" target="_blank">chat med oss på hverdager mellom 08.00 - 15.00</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (153 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="/bli-medlem/bransjerad-og-fagnettverk/"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Bransjeråd og fagnettverk</span> </div> <div class="block-entrance__intro">
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/medlemskap-i-fornybar-norge/innmelding/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2023/2/medl
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til innmeldingssiden her'

<a class="nho-button" href="/medlemskap-i-fornybar-norge/innmelding/"> <span>Gå til innmeldingssiden her</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=33&content.link=293900&content.category=&content.type.category=20&content.tags=" sty
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Presserom Fornybar Norge Om oss

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/om-oss/presserom/
Avvik: 175 | Bestått: 161
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Henvendelser fra media</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/thor-egil-braadland/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/aslak-overas/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (166 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=33&content.link=101583&content.category=&content.type.category=20&content.tags=" sty
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Fornybarakademiet - kunnskap og kompetanse

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/Kurs-konferanser-nettkurs-og-fagpublikasjoner/
Avvik: 184 | Bestått: 177
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-fornybarnorge"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=1054&content.
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="/Kurs-konferanser-nettkurs-og-fagpublikasjoner/publikasjoner_nettkurs/" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Nettbutikk/Publikasjoner</s
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/arrangement/2026/konferanser-2026/produksjonsteknisk-konferanse-ptk-2026/" tabindex="-1" target="_blank"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/arrangement/2026/konferanser-2026/fornybar-norges-arskonferanse-2026/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/con

2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (171 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=1054&content.link=490952&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" sty
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Kurs og konferanse kalender

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/arrangement/?c=en-fornybar-prod
Avvik: 190 | Bestått: 227
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'category' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="48" name="category" type="checkbox" value="48"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/oenske-om-at-kurs-blir-satt-opp/register" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Har du ønsker o
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (179 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=1083&content.link=5951&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Bruk av informasjonskapsler (cookies) Bruk av informasjonskapsler (cookies)

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/Cookies/
Avvik: 178 | Bestått: 150
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Samtykke til bruk av informasjonskapslene</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (171 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=33&content.link=644879&content.category=&content.type.category=896&content.tags=" st
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

HMS- og arbeidsmiljø i fornybarnæringen

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/hms/
Avvik: 180 | Bestått: 197
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Rollemodell</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4>Hvordan rapportere inn HMS-tall?</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 style="text-align: left;"> </h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (9 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/hms/rollemodell/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2025/3/eee31bc1-f9f4-48a4-b08a-ec8
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://svar.nho.no//2JHgEh" tabindex="-1"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://arbinn.nho.no/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2023/7/pexels-vanessa-garcia-
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/hms/hms_tema/likehel/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/contentassets/b9e1a0af70ba41fc8e4bd4ab047cc484/foto
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Gå til likehel.no'

<a class="nho-button" href="/hms/hms_tema/likehel/"> <span>Gå til likehel.no</span> <span class="iconbox"> <i class="ph-light ph-arrow-right"></i> </span> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://arbinn.nho.no/arbeidsrett/sykefravar_og_permisjoner/sykefravar-statistikk/artikler/sykefravar-i-nho-bedrifter/" tabindex="-1"> <picture>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/anne-mette-aasheim/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (164 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=35&content.link=293918&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen="" aria-label="Video av kunnskapsløftet" data-cookieconsent="ignore" frameborde
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Europeisk energisamarbeid

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/europeisk-energisamarbeid/
Avvik: 179 | Bestått: 163
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2024/8/25487.jpg?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2024/8/25487.jpg?mode=crop&a
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/b1abcbd23ece4204a32a84ee88a8d660/eu-1.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/b1abcbd23ece4204a32
Add descriptive alt text to the image
Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

<img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/18f8e7c7ea214eb99820f46af70663dd/eu-sak-2.png?mode=crop&quality=100&width=500&height=333" srcset="/contentassets/18f8e7c7ea214eb
Add descriptive alt text to the image
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 style="text-align: left;">Lurer du på noe? Kontakt oss gjerne:</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (8 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (163 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="/europeisk-energisamarbeid/norges-forhold-til-eu/"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Norges forhold til EU i energi- og klimapolitikken</span> </div>
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (238 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="/europeisk-energisamarbeid/ren-energi-pakken/"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Ren energi-pakken</span> </div> <div class="block-entrance__intro">
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/europeisk-energisamarbeid/norges-forhold-til-eu/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/globalassets/fotoware/2024/8/25487.jpg?mode=crop&quality
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/nyheter/2024/ungarn-tar-over-formannskapet-med-slagordet-gjor-europa-stort-igjen/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/b1abcbd23ece4
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" href="/nyheter/2024/slik-blir-eus-strategiske-agenda-2024-2029/" tabindex="-1"> <img alt="" height="333" loading="lazy" src="/contentassets/18f8e7c7ea214eb99820f46af70663dd/eu-sa
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/niklas-kalvo-tessem/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (163 avvik)

SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Medlemskontingent

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/bli-medlem/informasjon-om-meldemskontingent/
Avvik: 176 | Bestått: 176
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 style="text-align: left;">Lurer du på noe? Kontakt oss gjerne:</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/stein-gunnar-bondevik/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/anne-froland-beito/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: '2' appears 5 times

id="2"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (166 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=35&content.link=665075&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-label="Table" data-external="1" frameborder="0" height="400" id="datawrapper-chart-NS21r" scrolling="no" src="https://datawrapper.dwcdn.net/NS21r/1/" style="width: 0; min-width: 100% !imp
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Bransjeråd og fagnettverk

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/bli-medlem/bransjerad-og-fagnettverk/
Avvik: 172 | Bestått: 235
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="skin-fornybarnorge"> <!-- Google Tag Manager (noscript) --> <noscript><iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=1054&content.
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=1054&content.link=470910&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" sty
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Slik sender du faktura til Fornybar Norge, Fornybarakademiet AS og Fornybar Utvikling AS Om oss

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/om-oss/kontakt-oss/slik-sender-du-faktura-til-fornybar-norge/
Avvik: 178 | Bestått: 155
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5>Oppsett for EHF-fakturaen</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (171 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=33&content.link=158078&content.category=&content.type.category=20&content.tags=" sty
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Rekruttering og kompetanse

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/rekruttering-og-kompetanse/
Avvik: 173 | Bestått: 158
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 style="text-align: left;">Lurer du på noe? Kontakt meg gjerne:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 style="text-align: left;"> </h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (155 characters)

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="https://jenterogteknologi.com/"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Jenter og teknologi</span> </div> <div class="block-entrance__intro"> <span>Samarbe
Shorten link text to be concise while remaining descriptive
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/anneline-malling-breen/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (163 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=35&content.link=1177&content.category=42&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.nho.no/regionforeninger/"> <span> Alle regionkontor </span> </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Rollemodell

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/hms/rollemodell/
Avvik: 180 | Bestått: 162
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 style="text-align: left;">Lurer du på noe? Kontakt meg gjerne:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h4 style="text-align: left;"> </h4>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/anne-mette-aasheim/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (171 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=35&content.link=679066&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.nho.no/regionforeninger/"> <span> Alle regionkontor </span> </a>
Remove from tab order with tabindex='-1' or remove aria-hidden

Fornybarnæringen - tall og fakta

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/tall-og-fakta2/
Avvik: 179 | Bestått: 162
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Produksjon av fornybar energi i Norge</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h5

<h5 style="text-align: left;">Lurer du på noe? Kontakt oss gjerne:</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (2 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (171 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=35&content.link=613420&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Kurs og konferanse kalender

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/arrangement/?c=en-konferanse
Avvik: 190 | Bestått: 188
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (5 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'type' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input checked="" class="filterchip__input" id="type-" name="type" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'c' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input class="checkbox__input" id="c-" name="c" type="checkbox" value=""/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Radio/checkbox group 'category' not wrapped in fieldset with legend

<input id="48" name="category" type="checkbox" value="48"/>
Wrap related radio buttons or checkboxes in <fieldset> with <legend>
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="block-entrance__content" href="https://events.provisoevent.no/nho/events/oenske-om-at-kurs-blir-satt-opp/register" target="_blank"> <div class="block-entrance__name"> <span> Har du ønsker o
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
1.3.5 Identifiser inndataformål (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.5 (1.3.5 - Nivå AA)
MODERATE

Personal data field 'email' missing autocomplete attribute

<input id="email" name="email" placeholder="ola.nordmann@example.com" type="email"/>
Add autocomplete='email' to help users fill in the form
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (179 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=1083&content.link=5951&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Arbeidsliv

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/arbeidsliv/lonn-og-tariff/
Avvik: 178 | Bestått: 170
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>Tariffoppgjøret 2024</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 style="text-align: left;">Lurer du på noe? Kontakt oss gjerne:</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (6 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="/arbeidsliv/lonn-og-tariff/tariffoppgjoret-2024/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/202
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/nina-rivelsrod-aalborg/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/trine-lise-elmholt-berget/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/ane-bergo/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'inngang-tariffavtaler' appears 2 times

id="inngang-tariffavtaler"
Each ID must be unique on the page
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=35&content.link=409038&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Produksjonsteknisk konferanse 2026

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/arrangement/2026/konferanser-2026/produksjonsteknisk-konferanse-ptk-2026/
Avvik: 12 | Bestått: 51
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1> <a href="https://fornybarnorge.no/"> <img alt="Fornybarakademiet%20logo" src="/contentassets/1359e0f0753e49c9880a50dd35b60283/fornybar_norge_hovedlogo_farge_neg_rgb.png"/> </a> </h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>3.- 5. mars på Clarion Hotel Oslo Airport Gardermoen / The Qube</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 data-end="590" data-start="313">Sammen med vår hovedpartner Hydro Energi samler vi fagfolk og beslutningstakere innenfor produksjon av fornybar energi, til tre dager med høyaktuell og nyttig fagut
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (4 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="#navigation"> <span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="new-header-mobile-nav-toggler campaign-header" role="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-list new-header-mobile-nav-toggler
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://axacoair.se/go?uzsX8J7u" target="_blank"> Meld deg på </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://axacoair.se/go?uzsX8J7u" target="_blank"> Meld deg på </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/jo-eirik-froise/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=37&content.link=357749&content.category=22,35,1847&content.type.category=&content.ta
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture" allowfullscreen="" aria-label="PTK 2026" data-cookieconsent="ignore" frameborder="0" src="https
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Medlemskap

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/bli-medlem/
Avvik: 178 | Bestått: 179
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (4 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3 class="accordion-item__header"> <span class="accordion-item__header-text"> Politisk påvirkning og kommunikasjon - få innflytelse der det teller </span> </h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5 style="text-align: left;">Lurer du på noe? Kontakt oss gjerne:</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (7 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a class="menu-link" href="https://www.norskindustri.no/" target="_blank"> <span> Norsk Industri </span> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://hkraft.no/" tabindex="-1"> <picture> <source media="(min-width: 1210px)" srcset="/globalassets/fotoware/2023/5/pablo_hkraft_2023.jpg?widt
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/stein-gunnar-bondevik/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/anne-froland-beito/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/sezer-subasi/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a aria-hidden="true" class="block-action-image" href="https://arbinn.nho.no/kontakt-oss/" tabindex="-1"> </a>
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (165 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=35&content.link=495351&content.category=&content.type.category=&content.tags=" style
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe

Fornybar Norges Årskonferanse 2026

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/arrangement/2026/konferanser-2026/fornybar-norges-arskonferanse-2026/
Avvik: 13 | Bestått: 45
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
2.4.6 Overskrifter og ledetekster (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.6 (2.4.6 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Heading is empty

<h1> <a href="/"> <img alt="Fornybar%20Norge%20logo" src="/contentassets/195e73bea7934f4eb2a9872bc7e09a53/fornybar_norge_hovedlogo_farge_neg_rgb.png"/> </a> </h1>
Add descriptive text to the heading, or remove it if not needed
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (3 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3

<h3>16.-17. april på Radisson Blu Caledonien Hotel, Kristiansand</h3>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h3
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h3 to h5

<h5>Velkommen til Fornybar Norges Årskonferanse 2026</h5>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h4 instead of h5
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="#navigation"> <span aria-expanded="false" aria-haspopup="true" class="new-header-mobile-nav-toggler campaign-header" role="button"> <span class="ph-light ph-list new-header-mobile-nav-toggler
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://axacoair.se/go?mw39DHMD" target="_blank"> Meld deg på Fornybar Norges Årskonferanse </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Les mer'

<a class="block-person-readmore" href="/ansatt/sezer-subasi/">Les mer</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')
2.4.3 Fokusrekkefølge (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.3 (2.4.3 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Positive tabindex (1) disrupts natural focus order

<a class="skip-link" href="#hovedinnhold" tabindex="1">Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
Use tabindex='0' for focusable elements or '-1' for programmatic focus only
1.2.2 Teksting (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.2.2 (1.2.2 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Video has no captions track

<video aria-describedby="block-campaign-video-description" aria-label="Årskonferansen 2026" autoplay="" class="block-campaign-video-source js-video-player" loop="" muted="" playsinline="" poster="" ti
Add <track kind='captions' src='captions.vtt' srclang='nb' label='Norsk'>
1.4.2 Styring av lyd (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.4.2 (1.4.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Video has no native controls

<video aria-describedby="block-campaign-video-description" aria-label="Årskonferansen 2026" autoplay="" class="block-campaign-video-source js-video-player" loop="" muted="" playsinline="" poster="" ti
Add controls attribute or provide custom accessible controls
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (2 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5TFPPCZ&content.type.id=37&content.link=367744&content.category=22,35,1847&content.type.category=&content.ta
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

aria-describedby references non-existent ID: 'block-campaign-video-description'

<video aria-describedby="block-campaign-video-description" aria-label="Årskonferansen 2026" autoplay="" class="block-campaign-video-source js-video-player" loop="" muted="" playsinline="" poster="" ti
Ensure the referenced ID exists on the page

Om fornybarnæringen

https://www.fornybarnorge.no/om-naringen/
Avvik: 170 | Bestått: 184
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1a (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute

<img height="1" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=905420152960258&ev=PageView &noscript=1" width="1"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h3, should start with h1

<h3 class="site-header__search-heading"> Hva leter du etter? </h3>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

<nav title="Sosiale medie-lenker"> <ul class="new-footer-social-links"> <li> <a class="new-footer-social-links__link new-footer-social-links__link--linkedin" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/for
Add aria-label to distinguish between navigation regions (e.g., 'Main navigation', 'Footer navigation')
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
